description: This file defines a rehype plugin called 'rehypeBsTable' that applies CSS classes to table elements in markdown or MDX files when wrapped in a `<BsTable />` component. It imports types from 'hast' and 'unified', and functions from 'unist-util-visit'.

methods.name: rehypeBsTable
methods.description: A Plugin that returns a function to process the AST and apply CSS classes to table elements wrapped in a `<BsTable />` component.
